paragraphs: Senior full stack developer with a strong backend orientation, specialized in Java / Spring Boot, Python, enterprise integrations, cloud architecture, data engineering, and modernization programs for banking and financial services.

Brings end-to-end delivery ownership from planning and solution design through development, testing, release, production rollout, and post-production support. The profile combines hands-on coding with architecture, migration strategy, DevOps enablement, and cross-functional technical leadership.

Key achievements include core banking migration, API gateway and mediation layer design, Salesforce Marketing Cloud implementation, on-premises to AWS modernization, ETL optimization, encryption and anonymization initiatives, and delivery of data and reporting platforms with measurable business impact.
Scrum Master and Product Owner certified, with a delivery style centered on quality, security, traceability, and pragmatic execution.

highlights.title: Technical Leadership
highlights.description: End-to-end ownership across planning, design, implementation, release, and production support.

highlights.title: Backend Engineering
highlights.description: Java / Spring Boot and Python for APIs, microservices, domain logic, and integration-heavy systems.

highlights.title: Cloud & DevOps
highlights.description: AWS, Terraform, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, observability, and infrastructure modernization.

highlights.title: Data & Integrations
highlights.description: ETL / ELT, SQL and NoSQL, SFTP, SOAP, REST, API mediation, BI, CRM, and migration programs.
